packs.title: B1: društvo, rad i apstraktni pojmovi

example.target: Nezaposlenost mladih i dalje je velik problem.
example.gloss: Youth unemployment is still a big problem.

example.target: Za taj posao trebamo stručnjaka za računalne mreže.
example.gloss: For that job we need an expert in computer networks.

example.target: Na šalteru vam traže osobnu iskaznicu.
example.gloss: At the counter they ask you for your identity card.

example.target: Prebivalište sam prijavio u Zagrebu prije dvije godine.
example.gloss: I registered my permanent residence in Zagreb two years ago.

words.note: pf. podnijeti / impf. podnositi; podnijeti zahtjev, žalbu

example.target: Žalbu smo podnijeli već sljedeći dan.
example.gloss: We submitted the appeal the very next day.

words.note: pf. ovjeriti / impf. ovjeravati; ovjeriti kod javnog bilježnika

example.target: Prijevod diplome moraš dati ovjeriti.
example.gloss: You have to have the translation of your diploma certified.

words.note: ovlašten za nešto; ovlašteni sudski tumač

example.target: Samo je voditeljica ovlaštena potpisati taj dokument.
example.gloss: Only the manager is authorised to sign that document.

example.target: Jednakost pred zakonom vrijedi za sve građane.
example.gloss: Equality before the law applies to all citizens.

example.target: Nakon potresa ljudi su pokazali veliku solidarnost.
example.gloss: After the earthquake people showed great solidarity.

example.target: Predrasude najlakše nestaju kad ljude upoznaš osobno.
example.gloss: Prejudices disappear most easily when you meet people in person.

example.target: Suša je posljedica dugog razdoblja bez kiše.
example.gloss: The drought is a consequence of a long period without rain.

example.target: Liječenje traje otprilike šest tjedana.
example.gloss: The treatment lasts about six weeks.

example.target: Obrazovanje odraslih sve je traženije.
example.gloss: Adult education is increasingly in demand.

example.target: Diplomu je stekla na Filozofskom fakultetu.
example.gloss: She earned her degree at the Faculty of Humanities.

example.target: U zadaći je bilo samo nekoliko sitnih pogrešaka.
example.gloss: There were only a few small mistakes in the homework.

example.target: Dobila je stipendiju za studij u inozemstvu.
example.gloss: She got a scholarship to study abroad.

example.target: Preuzmi datoteku i otvori je na računalu.
example.gloss: Download the file and open it on the computer.

example.target: Poslala mi je poveznicu na članak o klimi.
example.gloss: She sent me a link to an article about the climate.

example.target: Našli smo jednostavno rješenje za taj problem.
example.gloss: We found a simple solution to that problem.

example.target: Nemam namjeru odustati tako lako.
example.gloss: I have no intention of giving up so easily.

example.target: Taj posao zahtijeva veliku strpljivost.
example.gloss: That job requires a lot of patience.

words.note: pf. ostvariti / impf. ostvarivati; ostvariti pravo, cilj

example.target: Konačno je ostvarila san o vlastitoj radionici.
example.gloss: She finally realised her dream of having her own workshop.

example.target: Odmah sam primijetio da nešto nije u redu.
example.gloss: I immediately noticed that something was wrong.

example.target: Prihvatila je ponudu bez razmišljanja.
example.gloss: She accepted the offer without thinking twice.

example.target: Sve ovisi o tome hoće li stići dokumenti.
example.gloss: Everything depends on whether the documents arrive.

example.target: Njegov savjet bio mi je vrlo koristan.
example.gloss: His advice was very useful to me.

example.target: Previše soli štetno je za zdravlje.
example.gloss: Too much salt is harmful to health.

example.target: Nužno je da svi dođu na vrijeme.
example.gloss: It is necessary for everyone to arrive on time.

example.target: Razlika je očita već na prvi pogled.
example.gloss: The difference is obvious at first glance.

example.target: Posao je zahtjevan, ali dobro plaćen.
example.gloss: The job is demanding but well paid.

example.target: Nova metoda pokazala se učinkovitijom od stare.
example.gloss: The new method proved more efficient than the old one.

example.target: Ta odjeća nije prikladna za razgovor za posao.
example.gloss: Those clothes are not appropriate for a job interview.

example.target: Situacija je složenija nego što se čini.
example.gloss: The situation is more complex than it seems.

example.target: Takva je odluka nepravedna prema mlađim kolegama.
example.gloss: Such a decision is unfair to the younger colleagues.
